name: Immunodiagnostic Systems HoldiR
summary: Immunodiagnostic Systems Holdings PLC is a specialty in-vitro diagnostics company focused on developing, manufacturing, and marketing innovative immunoassays and automated systems for clinical diagnostics. The company's products are used in the diagnosis and monitoring of various diseases, including bone metabolism, vitamin D deficiency, and autoimmune disorders. Headquartered in the UK, Immunodiagnostic Systems serves clinical laboratories and hospitals worldwide.
